sent_simp: 这部约法是民国初年制定的。
sent_trad: 這部約法是民國初年制定的。
pinyin: Zhè bù yuēfǎ shì Mínguó chūnián zhìdìng de.
english: This provisional constitution was enacted in the early years of the Republic.

sent_simp: 她在信中写道，希望早日重聚。
sent_trad: 她在信中寫道，希望早日重聚。
pinyin: Tā zài xìn zhōng xiědào, xīwàng zǎorì chóngjù.
english: She wrote in the letter that she hoped they would reunite soon.
